title: spathodea corymbosa
intro: Spathodea corymbosa, also known as the African tulip tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Bignoniaceae, native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Spathodea corymbosa include its potential to reduce fever, relieve respiratory issues, and treat gastrointestinal problems. The herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or capsules, and it is also used in traditional remedies such as poultices and ointments.
